runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "ruby", "build_system": "bundler", "package_manager": "bundler", "build_commands": ["bundle install --without no_ci", "bundle exec rspec"], "install_commands": ["apk add --no-cache build-base curl ca-certificates git libxml2 libxslt libyaml openssl libxml2-dev libxslt-dev libyaml-dev", "update-ca-certificates"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "2.4.10", "system_packages": ["libxml2", "libxslt", "libyaml", "openssl", "curl", "ca-certificates", "git"]}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "ruby:3.4.9-alpine3.23", "base_image_rationale": "Closest official Ruby image with an Alpine base that can be adapted to the project\u2019s dependencies while keeping build-time tool availability via apk.", "pitfalls": ["Project appears to target Ruby 2.4.10, but the chosen base_image provides Ruby 3.x; this may cause incompatibilities.", "Alpine-based base image uses apk for package management, requiring changes to install commands from apt-get-based syntax.", "nokogiri and other native gems may require specific libxml2/libxslt headers; ensure correct -dev packages are installed.", "Bundler without the no_ci group will install extra gems; coordinate with CI to reproduce expected environments."], "notes": "This blueprint assumes adapting the existing Debian/apt-based Dockerfile to an Alpine base; adjust package names and package-manager commands accordingly when generating the final Dockerfile."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM ruby:3.2-slim-bullseye

LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent" \
    description="Image for running the backup Rubygem"

ENV APP_HOME /usr/src/backup
WORKDIR $APP_HOME

# Install dependencies for building native gems and runtime
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      ca-certificates \
      curl \
      git \
      libxml2-dev \
      libxslt1-dev \
      libyaml-dev \
      zlib1g-dev \
      libcurl4-openssl-dev \
      tzdata && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    update-ca-certificates

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . .

# Install Ruby gem dependencies (excluding CI-only groups)
RUN bundle install --without no_ci

# Default to a shell
CMD ["bash"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ruby:3.4.9-alpine3.23

LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent" \
    description="Image for running the backup Rubygem"

ENV APP_HOME /usr/src/backup
WORKDIR $APP_HOME

# Install dependencies for building native gems and runtime
RUN apk add --no-cache \
  --update \
  build-base \
  curl \
  ca-certificates \
  git \
  libxml2 \
  libxslt \
  libyaml \
  openssl \
  tzdata \
  libxml2-dev \
  libxslt-dev \
  libyaml-dev && \
  update-ca-certificates

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . .

# Install Ruby gem dependencies (excluding CI-only groups)
RUN bundle install --without no_ci

# Default to a shell to allow interactive use or to run tests via external commands
CMD ["sh"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ruby:3.2-slim-bullseye

LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent" \
    description="Image for running the backup Rubygem"

ENV APP_HOME /usr/src/backup
WORKDIR $APP_HOME

# Install dependencies for building native gems and runtime
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      ca-certificates \
      curl \
      git \
      libxml2-dev \
      libxslt1-dev \
      libyaml-dev \
      zlib1g-dev \
      libcurl4-openssl-dev \
      tzdata && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    update-ca-certificates

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . .

# Install Ruby gem dependencies (excluding CI-only groups)
RUN bundle install --without no_ci

# Default to a shell
CMD ["bash"]
"}

FROM ruby:3.2-slim-bullseye

LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent" \
    description="Image for running the backup Rubygem"

ENV APP_HOME /usr/src/backup
WORKDIR $APP_HOME

# Install dependencies for building native gems and runtime
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      ca-certificates \
      curl \
      git \
      libxml2-dev \
      libxslt1-dev \
      libyaml-dev \
      zlib1g-dev \
      libcurl4-openssl-dev \
      tzdata && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    update-ca-certificates

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . .

# Install Ruby gem dependencies (excluding CI-only groups)
RUN bundle install --without no_ci

# Default to a shell
CMD ["bash"]
